channel.title: Red Hat Build of Trustee on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Red Hat Build of Trustee on Validated Patterns

item.title: Confidential Containers pattern
item.description: Deploy confidential containers on OpenShift using hardware-backed Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) on Azure and bare metal with Intel TDX, AMD SEV-SNP, and NVIDIA confidential GPU support.
